description: Legal document. Dated: [4]7[..] AM, which means no later than 1040 CE. In which Mevorakh and Manṣūr the sons of Suqlāb/Saqlāb empower Yaʿaqov b. Ṣalaḥ to claim from Shelomo b. Moshe their dues. Witnesses: Yosef b. Seʿadel, Yaʿaqov b. Yosef, and Qīmawayh b. Ḥasan (? קימויה בן חסן). The validation is signed by: Shemarya b. Elḥanan, David b. Aharon ha-Levi, Ḥasan b. Mevorakh b. Suqlāb/Saqlāb, and Menaḥem b. [...]. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
